explanation: The code defines a function that calculates and prints permutations of digits based on a provided input. In the main function, it initializes an array to track which digits are still available for permutation and calculates a factorial array to aid in generating the permutations. For each input from 1 to 12, it invokes the permutation function, which determines the position of each digit and prints the result. The recursion continues until all digits have been used, thus producing a complete set of permutations for the input number.
subject: - Print permutation from lexicographic order - Session 2 Q2 Part B
summary: This project implements a program that generates permutations based on a given input number, utilizing a recursive function to print the desired permutation sequence.
